title: takt op.Destiny
sourceNotes: Single-cour anime, 12 episodes. "takt op.Destiny: Haruka Tsuioku no Anna - Harmony of Hope" is a companion manga covering the same story and timeline from Anna Schneider's point of view, complete at 14 chapters. No official episode-to-chapter guide was found for this POV retelling, so it is mapped as one broad range spanning the full series — treat the chapter split as approximate.
